_note: Template MCP config for the two-plane read-only query surface. two-plane is a harness-convention dir (not a plugin), so set absolute paths: point args[0] at this dir's bin/two-plane-mcp.py and TWO_PLANE_DIR at your project's two-plane folder (charter.json / blueprint.json / lattice.json / ledger.jsonl). Drop the relevant block into your project or user .mcp.json.
